conformance.reason: StreamHook-handled (per-row cell flattening keyed by the page's sibling columns[] array, which the declarative records/computed_fields dialect cannot express — dynamic column names are not knowable statically); hook-covered, proven live by internal/connectors/hooks/smartsheets/hooks_test.go
